basic_details.job_title: CMD Kerala Sales Officer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Centre for Management Development (CMD Kerala) Sales Officer Notification 2026 has been released on 03 June 2026 on the official website of CMD Kerala. A total of 2 vacancies have been announced through the CMD Kerala Sales Officer Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: MBA with Minimum 5 years of experience in FMCG sales
qualification.details: MBA with Minimum 5 years of experience in FMCG sales. Excellent sales and negotiation skills. Experience in Modern Trade and Online Marketing will be given preference. Provide on-the-ground support for sales associates as they generate leads and close new deals. Sell to existing and potential direct accounts as well as provide sales support to distribution partners to participate in closing and order or to facilitate and add value to the selling process. Continually assess current business distribution Channels, develop and evaluate their performance and manage conflict ensuring alignment with territory plans. Effective decision making and problem-solving Skills and excellent verbal and written communication skills. Ability to demonstrate initiative and work well in a fast-paced environment.

salary_details.details: Rs. 3.5 Lacs - 4.8 Lacs Per Annum (CTC + TA/DA + Incentives)

selection_process: Application screening Criteria-based screening Written test Group discussion Skill test/proficiency test Interview
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the CMD Kerala Sales Officer Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 17-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of CMD Kerala to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the CMD Kerala Sales Officer recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application form for the CMD Kerala Sales Officer recruitment is 17th June 2026. Ensure your application is submitted well before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Sales Officer post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an MBA degree with a minimum of 5 years of experience in FMCG sales to be eligible for the Sales Officer position.

faq.question: Q3. How many vacancies are available for the Sales Officer post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies announced for the Sales Officer post by the Centre for Management Development (CMD Kerala).

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Sales Officer position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Sales Officer post is 35 years. There is no minimum age limit specified in the provided data.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Sales Officer role?
faq.answer: The selected candidates for the Sales Officer post will receive a salary ranging from Rs. 3.5 Lacs to 4.8 Lacs Per Annum, along with TA/DA and incentives.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for the CMD Kerala Sales Officer recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for the CMD Kerala Sales Officer recruitment.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Sales Officer recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process includes application screening, criteria-based screening, a written test, group discussion, a skill test/proficiency test, and a final interview.

faq.question: Q8. What type of job is this recruitment?
faq.answer: This is a contract-based job opportunity for the Sales Officer position at the Centre for Management Development (CMD Kerala).

faq.question: Q9. Where is the job location for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The job location for the Sales Officer post is Thiruvananthapuram, Kerala.

faq.question: Q10. Can candidates with experience in Modern Trade and Online Marketing apply?
faq.answer: Yes, candidates with experience in Modern Trade and Online Marketing will be given preference for the Sales Officer position, indicating it is a desirable qualification.
